name: Pumpernickel Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Slightly dry pumpernickel-bread cubes (6 slices)
3 cups Slightly dry white bread cubes (6 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in drippings just until soft in a large frying pan.
2. Add bread crumbs, water, salt, and pepper; toss lightly to mix.
3. Spoon mixture into 6-cup baking dish.
4. Bake with ducklings in a slow oven (325F) for 1 hour, or until crisp on top.
